message:
fix: resolve workspace-wide rustfmt drift and forensic_log clippy errors

Fix accumulated formatting drift across 39 files from concurrent agent edits.
Resolve all 202 clippy --lib errors in forensic_log.rs: add allow(missing_docs)
for schema types, derive Default for H3Summary, extract helper methods from
from_logger (174→~50 lines), use clone_from/Error::other, drop lock guards early.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1050,7 +1050,10 @@ mod tests {
     fn quic_core_error_display_all_variants() {

             (QuicCoreError::UnexpectedEof, "unexpected EOF"),
-            (QuicCoreError::VarIntOutOfRange(99), "varint out of range: 99"),
+            (
+                QuicCoreError::VarIntOutOfRange(99),
+                "varint out of range: 99",
+            ),
             (
                 QuicCoreError::InvalidHeader("test msg"),
                 "invalid header: test msg",
